destination_path.title: Destination Path
destination_path.description: The path to the Hugging Face Bucket where data will be written. Format: hf://buckets/{username}/{bucket}/{path}/. For example: hf://buckets/lhoestq/b/

file_format.title: File Format
file_format.description: The format to use when writing files to the bucket.

token.title: Hugging Face Token
token.description: Your Hugging Face token for authentication. Required for private buckets or write access.
